From Idea To Reality

Designing circuits & systems — exploring semiconductor devices, fabrication processes, analog/mixed-signal design, and digital hardware.

Work

Design Projects

Feb 2026 ↗
Voltage Controlled Oscillator

Current-starved, 7-stage ring VCO. 500 MHz centre frequency, 172.8 Mrad/s/V tuning gain over 0.4–1.0 V control range.

f₀ = 500 MHz KVCO = 172.8 Mrad/s/V 1.2 V Core 65 nm
Jan 2026 ↗
GPU Implementation / CPU Implementation

Parallel CTAT+PTAT current summation topology. 0.6 V output (~VDD/2), self-biased, 41.789 ppm/°C temperature coefficient.

VREF = 0.6 V 41.789 ppm/°C 1.2 V supply 65 nm
Dec 2025 ↗
Virtual Analog Synth

Series CTAT+PTAT voltage summation. 1.22 V silicon bandgap output, self-biased, 19.416 ppm/°C on I/O 500 nm MOSFET.

VREF = 1.22 V 19.416 ppm/°C 3.3 V supply I/O 500 nm
Oct 2025 ↗
Rail-to-Rail Op-Amp

Folded cascode, parallel NMOS+PMOS input stages, Class AB output. Characterised across all three CMR regions under 10 kΩ ‖ 10 pF load.

Gain 67.1–74.9 dB UGB 47.5–96.9 MHz PM 54°–75° 65 nm
Sep 2025 ↗
General Bias Circuit

Derives wide swing cascode current source and sink bias voltages plus Class AB output stage bias from BMR. Supply-independent biasing for all analog blocks.

Wide swing cascode Class AB Bias IBIAS = 10 µA VDD,min = 0.7 V 65 nm
Sep 2025 ↗
Reinforcement Learning GUI

Resistor-based, self-biased supply-independent current reference. Generates 10 µA bias current for all subsequent analog blocks.

IBIAS = 10 µA VDD,min = 0.7 V Supply Independent 65 nm
